title: Onyx Protocol - REKT
relevance_summary: Flash loan followed by donateToReserves on lending protocol

prevention.rule: Block any tx that calls donateToReserves() after a flash loan borrow in the same tx

monitoring_rules: Block any tx that calls donateToReserves() after a flash loan borrow in the same tx
summary: Onyx Protocol lost $2.1M due to a flash loan exploit where attackers manipulated the price of a newly added market, drained liquidity, and withdrew funds. A guard could have blocked such transactions by preventing calls to donateToReserves() immediately after a flash loan.
